summary: Implemented DinoBrain OS v2 foundations: package/server/installer version bumped to 2.0.0, added fail-closed os_begin_task pre-response entrypoint, switched default retrieval to hybrid_contextual_v2, added action gates, node lifecycle application, durable source chunks/provenance links, feedback correction writeback, behavior evaluation, v2 Observatory status, and v2 regression verification.
decisions: Use os_begin_task as the default v2 pre-response entrypoint for hooks and agents.
Fail closed when OS context is missing or destructive-risk gates block the request.
Use local deterministic hybrid retrieval: contextual chunks, BM25 sparse, dense-lite lexical similarity, RRF, provenance and root-intent reranking.
Treat direct user corrections as accepted behavior memory through record_feedback_correction.
Implement lifecycle actions as review records rather than silent destructive mutation.
next_steps: Review the uncommitted v2 diff, then commit and publish/release v2.0.0 if approved.
Run installer build/release after review so other PCs install the v2 OS contract.
Run git_sync dry-run before syncing the data repo; do not auto-push data without review.
